transcript: Yes, um... can I get some, uh, bird putty from you?
We-- no, no, we just have sausage.
I can't get it for you.
Eh, you start again? I'm gonna call the police on you, you know that?
Problem, because you call up before and I remember voice.
Yes, sir. I wanted to get some liquid sausage.
Ah... stick-a it in you ass.
'[looped]' Stick-a it in you ass. Stick-a it in you ass.
Look. I don't know where you come from, but that is not how we practice business in this country, sir.
Yeah, can I get some buttock sausage?
The problem is, I told you the stuff you want, we no carry it.

Why... like what, like you start the last time! I have the, uh... the, the, the phone trace. The police then they gonna connect you pretty soon. You better leave me alone! Because I told you, we don't have the stuff. Why you insist we have it, and how much it is? If we no carry, how many time I have to tell you?
Do you have chipmunk sausage, ma'am?
You, you have chipmunk muh... sausage, sir. You wanna... you wanna play around, go play around with your kind, okay?
Oh, you start again? Please... don't bother me.
Look, I need some... some po... porpoise jerky made.
I don't know how to make it, because we sell Italian sausage!
Yeah, I don't have shit! [speaks in Italian at length]
Yeah... I... uh... I don't know what you're saying, but, uh, I just needed some condor... sausage?
Yeah, we got... we got it, come over!
Each testicle! Are you gay, what?
